visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a man wearing a black cap, black sunglasses, and a black vest over a black t-shirt. He is outdoors in a modern urban area with a large glass building behind him. He smiles broadly, showing his teeth, and makes exaggerated stalking movements, crouching and looking around. (2) The scene shifts to an airport or station setting. A young man in a white t-shirt and tan shorts is seen from behind, pulling a large silver suitcase. Next to him is a young woman in a white t-shirt and tan shorts, also carrying bags. They are walking through a bright, spacious hall with white floors and modern architecture. (3) The man in black is seen indoors now, plotting with a young woman wearing a white t-shirt and a black backpack. They are near a glass partition, looking down at the couple from the previous phase. The man holds his phone as if filming. (4) In a hallway with a crosswalk pattern on the floor, the man in black quickly drops a piece of paper (a 10,000 yen bill) onto the floor in front of the approaching couple and quickly runs away, hiding behind a pillar. The woman in the couple bends down to pick it up, looking surprised. (5) The man in black is shown at a colorful vending machine. He uses his phone to pay and retrieves two bottles of juice. He then approaches the couple from behind while they are walking and hands the bottles to them without showing his face clearly, then scampers away. (6) The final scene takes place inside a brightly lit retail store filled with Disney merchandise, specifically Mickey and Minnie Mouse dolls. The man in black and his female companion hide behind display shelves, peeking through the gaps. The couple is visible in the background. A graphic of a diamond ring appears over the woman's head.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 嘎老闆尾隨員工. [Subtitle]: 尾隨員工第一天. (2) [Variety]: 死對頭!! [Subtitle]: 追蹤你的誰? (3) [Subtitle]: 楊亞妮! 她請了三天假, 然後連休五天, 跑來大阪幹嘛. (4) [Subtitle]: 終於可以約會了. (5) [Variety]: 尾隨目標抵達. (6) [Variety]: 尾隨高手. [Subtitle]: 我們好像狗仔哦. (7) [Variety]: 離目標非常近了!! [Logo]: 亞妮男友, 亞妮. (8) [Subtitle]: 他們怎麼沒有手牽手? [Variety]: (過年關心感情的親戚 be like). (9) [Subtitle]: 我們把錢丟在地上, 他們撿到錢就可以搭計程車. (10) [Variety]: 你的小天使來了. [Subtitle]: 怎麼掉了一萬塊!! (11) [Variety]: 你的小天使離場. [Variety]: 絕對沒被發現對吧. (12) [Subtitle]: 小天使今天來助攻的. [Variety]: 絕對不是我們也口渴. (13) [Subtitle]: 接力. [Variety]: (努力的邱比特). (14) [Subtitle]: 哇~ 撿到的哦. 日本都這麼好嗎? (15) [Variety]: 開心的邱比特. [Variety]: 狗仔兼任求婚團隊? (16) [Variety]: 接不接受!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male in black), 1 female assistant, and a couple (1 male, 1 female) being followed.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character (YGA) wears a black baseball cap, black sunglasses, a black t-shirt, and a black tactical-style vest with multiple pockets. He also wears a small tan crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a modern glass-walled outdoor area to a bright airport terminal (Kobe Airport) and finally into a Disney-themed merchandise store with shelves full of Mickey Mouse plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic music featuring a strong synth beat. The male speaker's voice is loud and animated, speaking rapidly with high pitch variability as he describes the 'stalking' plan. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect transitions the scene to an airport environment where soft ambient chatter and footsteps are audible. The speaker whispers in a conspiratorial tone. (3) A digital 'beep' sound occurs as a vending machine is used, followed by the sound of bottles clinking. The music shifts to a more playful, tiptoeing style. (4) Sudden loud laughter and a 'ding' sound effect emphasize the moment the couple finds the money. The male speaker continues his fast-paced narration with high emotional arousal. (5) As the video enters the store, the music transitions into a sentimental, piano-led ballad. The vocal tone of the speaker becomes softer and more emotional, mimicking the romantic atmosphere of a potential proposal scene.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Inciting Incident -> Series of Actions -> Climax
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous and heartwarming vlog intended to entertain viewers by showing a boss (YGA) 'stalking' his employee in Japan to secretly play the role of a 'Secret Angel.' He provides anonymous gifts and money to help the couple enjoy their trip, culminating in a romantic setup in a store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of variety-show style text overlays and sound effects to maintain a high-energy, comedic pace common in Taiwanese social media content.
